workflow.name: Puber Dependency Update
workflow.description: Update Puber Gradle dependencies or tooling, verify fallout, fix issues, and clean up safely.

transition_groups.description: Start dependency update from the task body.
Dependency versions changed and fallout verification is needed.
Dependency update is blocked by package lookup, credentials, build setup, or unsafe version choices.
Verification found fallout; user approval required before fixes.
Dependency update verification passed; run conservative cleanup.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.

edges.prompt_template:
Run the Puber dependency update flow for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/dependency-update.md. Treat the task body as the filter/security/risk instruction. Create an explicit .todo/dependency-update-<date-or-scope> workspace; do not infer or create .todo/.current.

Update gradle/libs.versions.toml and related build files only as needed. Prefer patch/minor safe batches; keep major updates isolated or report them as skipped if too risky for this task. Verify with focused Gradle commands using ./tools/agentw in .kent/worktrees and ./gradlew in the main checkout.

Complete with verify and provide workspace_path, plan_path, updated_dependencies, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked if package lookup, credentials, or build setup is blocked and provide blocker_reason.

Verify Puber dependency update fallout read-only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Inspect {{.Params.changed_files}}, updated dependencies {{.Params.updated_dependencies}}, and {{.Params.verification_summary}}. Run focused verification if practical. Do not edit files in this node.

Complete with done if accepted. Complete with needs_changes if fallout fixes are needed and provide workspace_path, verification_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked if verification cannot complete and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the dependency update plan.md or report artifact.
Dependencies or tooling versions changed by this task.
Files changed by the dependency update.
Commands run by the updater and their pass/fail results.
Why dependency update cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template: Fix Puber dependency update fallout. Apply only fixes requested in {{.Params.verification_report}}, verify narrowly, and complete with verify or blocked.

parameters.description: Verification findings and fallout to fix.
Files changed by the dependency update so far.

edges.prompt_template: Run conservative Puber task cleanup. Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why verification cannot complete, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template: Re-verify the Puber dependency update after fallout fixes. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked.

parameters.description: Original verification findings and fix summary.
Files changed by update and fallout fixes.
Why fallout fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.
